headline: Can TRV Sustain Its Profit Momentum Through AI-Driven Transformation?
summary: Travelers doubles down on AI, launching an Agentic AI Claims Assistant and boosting tech spend to $1B+, driving underwriting gains and efficiency gains.

headline: Travelers Shareholder Vote Tests Board Leadership And Climate Risk Oversight
summary: Travelers Companies faces two shareholder proposals at its upcoming annual meeting that target board leadership and climate disclosure. One proposal calls for an independent board chair, separating the roles of chair and chief executive. A second proposal seeks expanded climate related financial disclosures on how pricing and coverage might reflect climate risk. Company management is urging investors to vote against both initiatives, setting up a contested governance vote. For investors...

headline: Why the Dow Is Beating the S&P 500 Today
summary: Salesforce and a handful of other larger stocks were keeping the Dow around breakeven on Monday.  Only 13 of the Dow's 30 stocks were rising, but the blue-chip index was moving in and out of positive territory in the first-half or so of trading.  Other big stocks lifting the Dow were International Business Machines, JPMorgan Chase, Apple, and Travelers, which together added nearly 100 points.
